heading: Rejection of applications
label: 7108 Rejection of applications
text: An application for review on appeal shall not be entertained unless it is in conformity with this chapter.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4008 of this title
amendments: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4008 of this title
